title: First-time buyer needs help in Bentonville
snippet: Buyer is comparing starter homes near work and bike trails.
message: Looking for a starter home around Bentonville or Rogers under 350k.

title: Family relocating to Fayetteville this fall
snippet: Needs neighborhood advice and wants an agent familiar with schools.
message: Moving to Fayetteville for work and trying to find a 4 bedroom home before September.

title: Owner asking about selling a rental in Springdale

message: Rental in Springdale may be sold this year if pricing looks strong.
